title: Staurogyne obtusa

taxonomy: Staurogyne obtusa is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Acanthaceae. This family is commonly known as the acanthus or acanthus family, which consists of over 2,400 species of plants. Staurogyne obtusa is further classified as a genus within the family, specifically in the genus Staurogyne, which includes around 80 species of plants. The Staurogyne genus is part of the tribe Staurogyninae, which is a subgroup of the family Acanthaceae. The classification of Staurogyne obtusa is based on its morphological characteristics, such as its leaf shape and flower structure.
